ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Andhra Cements Ltd has had its credit rating of "IND BBB/Stable" for long-term and "IND A3+" for short-term bank loan facilities affirmed by India Ratings & Research. A material positive impact is the reduction in total bank loan facilities from INR 9,869.70 million to INR 9,389.70 million, indicating a decrease in outstanding or committed debt. While the "BBB" rating signifies moderate credit risk, the "Stable" outlook and reduced facility size suggest no immediate deterioration in the company's financial profile.
